allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem *ekt in GIT sein. Das habe ich gerade angelegt:)
PowerShell(npx sanity projects create "Samaritano" --organization personal 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell(npx sanity projects list 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Host "---ORGS---"; node -e "const {createClient} = require\('@sanity/client'\); const c = createClient\({apiVersion:'2024-01-01', token: process.env.SANITY_AUTH_TOKEN || ''}\); c.request\({uri:'/organizations'}\).then\(r => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r,null,2\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($token = "sk2L8n6VNV7S47ikIqsISfs4VN8PTZI1GTbf7r1S9izY5uDldMrTfvFXrzcmTdvXdUKS2aocso5bTu0BP"; $h = @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"}; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.sanity.io/v2024-01-01/organizations" -Headers $h; $r.value | Select-Object id, name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($token = "sk2L8n6VNV7S47ikIqsISfs4VN8PTZI1GTbf7r1S9izY5uDldMrTfvFXrzcmTdvXdUKS2aocso5bTu0BP"; $h = @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"}; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.sanity.io/v2024-01-01/organizations" -Headers $h; Write-Host "Type: $\($r.GetType\(\).Name\)"; Write-Host "Count: $\($r.Count\)"; if \($r.value\) { $r.value | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.id\) - $\($_.name\)" } } else { $r | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.id\) - $\($_.name\)" } })

PowerShell($token = "sk2L8n6VNV7S47ikIqsISfs4VN8PTZI1GTbf7r1S9izY5uDldMrTfvFXrzcmTdvXdUKS2aocso5bTu0BP"; $h = @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"}; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.sanity.io/v2024-01-01/organizations" -Headers $h; $obj = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Top-level type: $\($obj.GetType\(\).Name\)"; if \($obj -is [array]\) { $obj | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "id=$\($_.id\) name=$\($_.name\)" } } else { $obj.PSObject.Properties.Name | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Key: $_" } })
PowerShell(npx sanity projects create "Samaritano" --organization oC2AvBZrV 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\skuehne\\Desktop\\Projekt\\samaritano-web\\package.json"\); Write-Host "First 4 bytes: $\($bytes[0..3] -join ','\)"; if \($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\) { Write-Host "STILL HAS BOM" } else { Write-Host "OK: no BOM" }; Write-Host "Validating JSON..."; node -e "console.log\(require\('./package.json'\).name\)")

PowerShell($repo = "AImitSK/samaritano-web"; Write-Host "=== WEBHOOKS ==="; gh api "repos/$repo/hooks" --jq '.[] | {id, name, active, events, url: .config.url, last_response: .last_response}' 2>&1; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== ACTIONS / WORKFLOW RUNS ==="; gh api "repos/$repo/actions/runs" --jq '.workflow_runs[0:5] | .[] | {name, status, conclusion, head_sha, created_at}' 2>&1; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== BRANCH PROTECTION main ==="; gh api "repos/$repo/branches/main/protection" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== INSTALLED GITHUB APPS ==="; gh api "repos/$repo/installation" --jq '{app_slug: .app_slug, app_id: .app_id, target_type: .target_type, repository_selection: .repository_selection, permissions: .permissions}' 2>&1)

PowerShell($repo = "AImitSK/samaritano-web"; Write-Host "=== GITHUB DEPLOYMENTS LISTE ==="; gh api "repos/$repo/deployments" --paginate=false 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -First 8 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \("id={0}  sha={1}  env={2}  created={3}" -f $_.id, $_.sha.Substring\(0,8\), $_.environment, $_.created_at\) }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== STATUSES OF VERY LATEST \(commit 0aa7ab4\) ==="; gh api "repos/$repo/commits/0aa7ab4/status" --jq '{state: .state, statuses: [.statuses[] | {state, description, context, target_url, updated_at}]}' 2>&1; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== CHECK-RUNS ==="; gh api "repos/$repo/commits/0aa7ab4/check-runs" --jq '{total: .total_count, runs: [.check_runs[] | {name, status, conclusion, app: .app.slug}]}' 2>&1)

PowerShell($repo = "AImitSK/samaritano-web"; gh api "repos/$repo/deployments?per_page=8" 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \("{0}  sha={1}  env={2}  task={3}" -f $_.created_at, $_.sha.Substring\(0,8\), $_.environment, $_.task\) }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== LATEST STATUS PER DEPLOYMENT ==="; $deps = gh api "repos/$repo/deployments?per_page=4" 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach \($d in $deps\) { $statuses = gh api "repos/$repo/deployments/$\($d.id\)/statuses?per_page=1" 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host \("dep {0} sha {1}: latest status state={2} desc='{3}'" -f $d.id, $d.sha.Substring\(0,8\), $statuses[0].state, $statuses[0].description\) })
